Enums - Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Enumerations mirroring the ObjC MPGOEnums.h integer values.
Enums.AcquisitionMode - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
High-level acquisition scheme for a run.
Enums.ByteOrder - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Byte order of a signal buffer on disk.
Enums.ChromatogramType - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Chromatogram kind.
Enums.Compression - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Compression algorithm applied to a signal buffer.
Enums.EncryptionLevel - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Multi-level protection granularity (MPEG-G style).
Enums.Polarity - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Ion polarity for mass spectrometry.
Enums.Precision - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Numeric precision of a signal buffer.
Enums.SamplingMode - Enum Class in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
Axis sampling regularity.
